summary: POTUS retweet of the same White House Indiana Hoosiers championship recap. Frames show Trump walking outside the White House, the podium jersey presentation, and B-roll of the Indiana helmet, trophy and 'TRUMP 47' jersey, over a Trump speech welcoming the team. An event/speech recap, not a music-driven cinematic spectacle.
notable_text: Tweet: 'CHAMPION ENERGY.'; B-roll of 'TRUMP 47' Indiana jersey and CFP National Championship trophy
